sections.heading: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by
sections.title: Notice issued under Banking Act sections
sections.summary: This section states that the Notice is issued under specific sections of the Banking Act 1970. The notice is authorized by sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3), and 55(1) as applied by section 55ZJ(1) of the Banking Act 1970. The notice is a legal instrument that establishes its authority through these statutory provisions.

requirements.text: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by section 55ZJ(1) of the Banking Act 1970

sections.source_quote: This Notice is issued under sections 55(1), 57D(1)(a) and (3) and 55(1) as applied by section 55ZJ(1) of the Banking Act 1970.
sections.relevance_reason: commencement/assent dates, quorum, officials' pay or leave

sections.heading: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024:
sections.title: Cancellation of specific MAS Notices effective 10 May 2024
sections.summary: This section lists six MAS Notices that are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024. The cancelled notices include technology risk management and cyber hygiene notices from various dates. These notices are no longer in force after the specified date.

requirements.text: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024
MAS Notice 644 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013
MAS Notice 655 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019
MAS Notice 644A "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013
MAS Notice 655A "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019
MAS Notice 1114 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 1 July 2021
MAS Notice 1118 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 1 July 2021

sections.source_quote: The following Notices are cancelled with effect from 10 May 2024: (a) MAS Notice 644 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013; (b) MAS Notice 655 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019; (c) MAS Notice 644A "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 21 June 2013; (d) MAS Notice 655A "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 6 August 2019; (e) MAS Notice 1114 "Notice on Technology Risk Management" dated 1 July 2021; (f) MAS Notice 1118 "Notice on Cyber Hygiene" dated 1 July 2021.
